reason: The text is a high-level introduction, not detailing the user algorithm, models, or data access necessary for reproducing PPP-B2b results.
novelty_audit: Introduces the technical framework and performance of BDS-3 BDSBAS and PPP-B2b, describing system design and initial results.
metrics: Orbit and clock offset accuracy, ionosphere integrity, positioning accuracy, convergence time.
main_results: BDSBAS provides integrity-assured corrections for aviation; PPP-B2b enables real-time PPP with high accuracy (cm-level) after convergence.
